title: Plumbaginales
content: Plumbaginales is an order of flowering plant s. The order is recognized by several systems, such as the Wettstein system, last revised in 1935, the Engler system, in its update of 1964 and the Cronquist system, 1981. Its circumscription is typically: Cronquist placed this order in his subclass Caryophyllidae of three orders.
